name: Dimension
title: Dimension by HTML5 UP
description: Dark-themed single-page site with a striking centered layout. Diamond-shaped gem icon logo at top, large site title, subtitle paragraph, and a horizontal navigation row (Intro, Work, About, Contact). Clicking nav items opens modal-style article panels that overlay the background — each panel has a title, image, and text content. Background is a dark photo with animated overlay pattern. Contact panel includes a full form (name, email, message) and social icons row. The entire page is a single viewport with no scrolling — all content lives in overlay modals. Uppercase letter-spaced typography gives a modern, editorial feel.

typography.style: Modern editorial. Wide letter-spacing with uppercase transforms. Semi-bold headings, light body. Spacious, airy feel despite dark theme.

layoutDetails: Single viewport, no scroll. Centered content with flexbox. Navigation triggers modal-style article overlays with CSS transitions. Background image with animated overlay. Articles appear as centered panels with max-width constraint. Ghost/transparent buttons with white borders.
visualStyle: Dark, modern, editorial. Animated background with overlay pattern. Modal-based content panels — no traditional page flow. Ghost buttons with white borders. Wide letter-spacing uppercase typography. Diamond icon logo. Sophisticated and mysterious.

name: Ethereal
title: Ethereal by HTML5 UP
description: Horizontal-scrolling single-page portfolio/showcase with a unique side-scrolling panel layout. Opens with a banner panel: left side has a large heading, subtitle text, and a circular 'Next' arrow button; right side shows a filtered portrait image. Scrolls horizontally through panels: a spotlight section with full-bleed background image and overlaid text, a colored panel with intro text and a 3x2 grid of Font Awesome icons (gem, camera, cog, paper-plane, chart, code), another large spotlight with background image, a gallery panel with 9 images in a masonry-style grid (groups of 3 and individual images at varying spans), a contact panel with a 2-column layout (left: name/email/message form with 'Send Message' button; right: social media contact icons for Twitter, Facebook, Snapchat, Instagram, Medium), and an elements/style-guide panel. Preloader animation on page load. Soft pastel gradient color scheme with purple, coral, and warm gold tones.

typography.style: Light body text on dark panels, clean sans-serif with tight letter-spacing

layoutDetails: Horizontal scrolling panels using flexbox. Each panel spans a portion of the viewport width. Content uses span-based grid system (span-1-5, span-3, etc.). Gallery uses grouped image layout with varying spans. Responsive: collapses to vertical scroll on mobile.
visualStyle: Dreamy, ethereal aesthetic with soft pastel gradients (purple-coral-gold). Filtered/tinted images with overlay textures. Horizontal scroll creates a unique browsing experience. Panels alternate between colored backgrounds and full-bleed images.

name: Hexashop
title: Hexashop Ecommerce HTML CSS Template
description: E-commerce fashion template with a clean white design and Poppins font. Sticky header with logo image and multi-level dropdown navigation. Hero banner uses a 2-column layout: large left image with overlay text and Purchase Now CTA, right side has a 2x2 grid of category images (Women, Men, Kids, Accessories) with hover overlay descriptions. Product sections for Men, Women, and Kids each feature Owl Carousel sliders with product cards showing image, hover action icons (eye, star, cart), product name, price, and 5-star ratings. Explore section has a 3-column image grid. Subscribe section with email input. Footer has 4 columns.

typography.style: Clean modern Poppins with strong heading weights, minimal color palette

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container-fluid for hero, container for sections. Sticky header. Owl Carousel for product sliders. 2-column hero with 2x2 sub-grid.
visualStyle: Minimalist black-and-white e-commerce design with clean product cards, hover overlays, and elegant typography-focused layout.

name: Kool Store
title: Kool Store - Responsive eCommerce Template
description: Multi-page e-commerce template with 3-tier header: top bar with Sign Up/Log In links and social icons, main header with 'Kool Store' logo and horizontal menu (Home, Catalogs, FAQs, Policies, About), and sub-navigation bar with Shop/Details/Contact links and free shipping notification. Main content features a mixed product grid layout: left column with single product card (image, title, partner, price, description), center column with 2 stacked featured products with overlay content, right column with detailed product card including gender/size/color dropdown selectors. Below is a 3-column row with 2 product cards and an ad placement image. New Products section displays 4 product cards in a row. Vote For Future Products section shows 4 product images with voting buttons. Newsletter subscription section. Footer has 4-column layout (About, Follow Us, Useful Links, Contact info). Additional pages: product-detail.html and contact.html.

typography.style: Clean and commercial sans-serif optimized for product display and readability

layoutDetails: 3-tier header structure. Container-based layout (1170px max). Mixed product grid with varying column widths. 4-column product rows for new products. Multi-page with product detail and contact pages. Responsive at 991px, 767px, 581px.
visualStyle: Clean e-commerce aesthetic with red accent color on white. Multi-tier navigation for easy browsing. Mixed product grid creates visual hierarchy. Professional retail feel with social integration.

name: Sixteen Clothing
title: Sixteen Clothing HTML Template
description: E-commerce clothing store template with a multi-page structure including product listing pages, product detail pages, and category navigation. Features a top navigation bar with shopping cart icon and category dropdown menus. Hero section with a large promotional banner and call-to-action buttons. Product grid displays clothing items with images, names, prices, and hover effects revealing quick-view or add-to-cart buttons. Sidebar with category filters, price range filters, and size selectors. Product detail page shows large product image, description, size/color selectors, and add-to-cart button. Owl Carousel for featured products slider. Clean, modern fashion aesthetic with generous whitespace and Bootstrap 4 responsive grid.

typography.style: Lato with clean fashion-forward typography, minimal and modern

layoutDetails: Multi-page layout with shared navbar and footer. Product listing with sidebar filters and main grid. Product detail with image gallery and info panel. Bootstrap 4 responsive grid.
visualStyle: Clean fashion e-commerce with dark gray accent, white backgrounds, product card grid with hover effects, and minimal decoration. Modern retail aesthetic.

name: Sprint
title: Sprint HTML5 Template
description: E-commerce oriented multi-page template with a fullscreen image slider (bxSlider) featuring 5 slides with thumbnail navigation strip at the bottom. Fixed header with logo and horizontal navigation. Services section displays 4 icon-based feature cards in a row. Product promotion area shows New Arrivals with small product thumbnails flanking a large central product image. Products section presents items in a grid with thumbnails, titles, and Add to Cart buttons. Contact section with a form and newsletter signup. Footer with social media icons.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with bold headings and uppercase section titles

layoutDetails: Multi-page layout with Bootstrap 3 grid. Full-width image slider with thumbnail pager. Product grid uses equal-height columns.
visualStyle: Clean e-commerce style with gold/yellow accent. Product-focused layout. White background with subtle borders. Professional and commercial feel.

name: Zay Shop
title: Zay Shop eCommerce HTML CSS Template
description: E-commerce multi-page template with a dark top navigation bar (email, phone, social links) and a main navbar with brand logo, navigation links (Home, About, Shop, Contact), search icon, and cart icon. Hero section features a Bootstrap 5 carousel with product slides. Categories section displays product category cards with images. Featured products grid shows items with images, star ratings, prices, and 'Buy Now' buttons. Brand carousel at the bottom. Multi-page with Shop listing, Product detail, About, and Contact pages. Green (#59ab6e) accent color with Roboto font. Clean, modern e-commerce design.

typography.style: Light weight body with medium headings. Clean modern e-commerce readability.

layoutDetails: Dark top bar + main navbar. Carousel hero. Category cards grid. Product listing grid. Multi-page with shop, product detail, about, contact. Bootstrap 5 grid.
visualStyle: Clean modern e-commerce with green accent. Dark top bar contrasting with white content. Product cards with ratings and prices. Brand carousel. Professional shopping experience.

name: Aviato
title: Aviato | E-commerce template
description: E-commerce multi-page Bootstrap template with a top header bar (phone number, centered SVG logo, cart dropdown with item preview), main navigation with dropdown menus, and a fullscreen hero slider with product imagery. Features include product category grid, product listing with hover effects and quick-view, single product page with image gallery and size/color selectors, shopping cart page, checkout flow, user dashboard with profile management, blog with multiple layouts, pricing tables, and contact page. Extensive multi-page structure covering full e-commerce workflow. Poppins font with clean minimal design. Themefisher icon font for UI icons.

typography.style: Light weight Poppins throughout. Minimal, fashion-forward typography with thin weights.

layoutDetails: Top bar + main nav + hero slider. Product grids. Full e-commerce page set (cart, checkout, dashboard). Blog layouts. Bootstrap 3 grid with extensive page templates.
visualStyle: Minimal fashion e-commerce with black and white palette. Clean product cards with hover effects. SVG logo. Cart dropdown preview. Professional shopping experience with full checkout flow.

name: Little Fashion
title: Tooplate's Little Fashion
description: E-commerce fashion template built on Bootstrap 5 with a clean, modern design. Opens with a preloader, then reveals a navigation bar with the brand name and shopping links. The hero section features a full-width Slick slideshow with large fashion images and overlay text. An about section introduces the brand with tabbed content including a YouTube video embed. A front product section highlights retail shop features with an image and descriptive text. The featured products section displays three product cards with images, badges (New Arrival, Low Price), titles, descriptions, and prices. Footer includes newsletter signup, quick links, social media icons, and copyright. Uses Inter font with an orange-red primary accent color.

typography.style: Clean modern sans-serif (Inter). Bold headings with regular body weight. Larger-than-usual body text (20px). Orange-red accent for CTAs.

layoutDetails: Full-width hero slideshow. Tabbed about section with video. Two-column product feature. Three-column product cards grid. Multi-column footer with newsletter form.
visualStyle: Clean minimal e-commerce aesthetic. White background with subtle light blue sections. Orange-red accent for buttons and links. Product cards with badges and pricing. Modern, spacious layout.

name: Pixie
title: Pixie - Ecommerce HTML5 Template
description: E-commerce multi-page template with Bootstrap 4. Pre-header announcement bar. Dark navbar with logo image. Home page features a fullscreen banner with heading, description, and Order Now CTA button. Featured Items section with Owl Carousel product slider showing product images, names, and prices. Subscribe section with email signup form. Latest Products grid with product cards. Footer with multi-column links, about text, and social icons. Separate pages for Products, About Us, Contact Us, and Single Product detail. Blue accent color with clean, minimal product presentation.

typography.style: Clean, modern sans-serif with light body weight. Small body size for compact product layouts.

layoutDetails: Multi-page e-commerce with Bootstrap 4 grid. Dark fixed navbar. Home page with fullscreen banner, product carousel, and product grid. Separate product listing, detail, about, and contact pages.
visualStyle: Clean e-commerce template with dark navbar, blue accent, product carousels, and minimal product cards. Professional and conversion-focused.

name: Shelf
title: SHELF - Your Online Bookstore
description: Online bookstore multi-page with textured wood-grain background behind white container. Large uppercase site name, horizontal nav. 8-item book gallery in 4-column grid with hover overlays and pagination. Highlight section with icon and Live Chat button. Team, Contact, Preview pages.
layoutDetails: Multi-page with white container on textured background. 4-column gallery with pagination.
visualStyle: Bookstore with wood-grain background, white content area, blue accent.
